## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots if available.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g., 20.11.0]
- **pnpm version**: [e.g., 9.15.0]
- **Browser** (if applicable): [e.g., Chrome 130, Firefox 133]
- **OpenCanvas version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Affected Application

- [ ] write-web
- [ ] grid-web
- [ ] deck-web
- [ ] ai-runtime
- [ ] Core packages
- [ ] Other (specify below)

## Console Output

```
Paste any relevant console errors or logs here.
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. If you can identify the relevant package or source file, please mention it.
